title: 📝 Writing Task: A Memorable Day at School
prompts: 1. What is one special event or activity you remember from school?
2. Where and when did it happen?
model: One of the most memorable days at my school was the science fair last year. It happened in the school gym on a Thursday morning. My friend Ahmed and I worked together on a volcano project. We were nervous but excited. When the volcano erupted with baking soda and vinegar, everyone clapped. I felt proud because our hard work paid off. That day taught me that teamwork makes everything better.
